nasb.text: You shall not eat of their flesh nor touch their carcasses; they are unclean to you.

esv.text: You shall not eat any of their flesh, and you shall not touch their carcasses; they are unclean to you.

cnv.text: 這些走獸的肉你們不可吃，牠們的屍體你們不可摸，你們應視為不潔淨。

ccb.text: 你们不可吃它们的肉，也不可摸它们的尸体，因为它们对你们来说不洁净。
